themes.label: Prayer
themes.summary: This chapter centers on prayer, calling on God, supplication, or worshipful petition. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "When called to risky obedience, do I seek God in prayer before acting, trusting outcomes to Him?". Word-study detail reinforces "שְׁאֵֽלָתִ֖י: My petition - a petition; by implication, a loan".
